title: FeedbackCreate
description: Validation contract for inbound feedback submissions. Update in the same PR as the handler. Owner: feedback-team.

source.description: Origin of the submission. Determines downstream routing.

email.description: Optional contact email. Null when anonymous.

message.description: Free-form feedback text. Trimmed before storage.

examples.message: Dark mode toggle would be great.

$comment: Invalid example (must be rejected): {"source":"web"} -- missing required 'message'.
